parent.name: Mike Thompson
parent.text: Hands down the best Classic Burger in town. Perfectly grilled, juicy, and loaded with flavor. The cheese was melty perfection. Will definitely be back!

replies.name: Jessica Ruiz
replies.text: I went with Mike last week and totally agree on the burger! We also got the Loaded Fries and they were addictive. Best meal we've had in months at Todd's.

replies.name: Susan Thompson
replies.text: My husband Mike told me he was out of town that day! How dare you two sneak off for burgers without me? Next time, I'll stuff that burger down your throat myself, Jessica!

replies.name: Todd (Owner)
replies.text: Mike, thanks for the love on the Classic Burger — glad the cheese was melty enough to win you over. Next time bring Susan so I can see the family reunion in person. Burgers on me! 🍔

name: Robert Kline
text: Ordered the Grilled Steak and it was cooked perfectly medium-rare. Super tender and flavorful. Quantities are limited for a reason — it's that good!

name: Lisa Chen
text: The Fried Mushrooms were incredible! Crispy, flavorful, and the dipping sauce was perfect. Also loved the Caesar Salad. Great spot for both food and bait runs 😂

parent.name: BigFishDave87
parent.text: Todd's is a GENIUS for selling live bait right next to the grill. Caught a 22-inch bass on minnows I bought there 20 minutes earlier. Then ate a perfect ribeye. Life doesn't get better than this. 10/10 would recommend to every angler in Kalamazoo.

replies.name: KarenFromKzoo
replies.text: Are you serious? I just wanted a nice family burger night and there's a bucket of live worms two feet from my table. The smell! The SLIME! Never again. Todd's lost a customer forever.

replies.name: BigFishDave87
replies.text: @KarenFromKzoo lady it's called ambiance. You want boring chain-restaurant vibes go to Applebee's. This is REAL Michigan — grill + bait under one roof. Cry about it.

replies.name: CrawlDad69
replies.text: Dave speaks truth. Bought nightcrawlers, caught a limit of perch, grilled 'em up at home. Todd's is the ultimate life hack. Karen needs to toughen up.

replies.name: Todd (Owner)
replies.text: Dave, thanks for the shoutout — that 22-inch bass story made my day. Next time bring the catch back and I'll grill it for you on the house. Tight lines and juicy steaks! 🎣🍖

parent.name: WormWhispererMI
parent.text: The fact that I can get a loaded cheeseburger AND premium wrigglers in one stop is PEAK convenience. Todd is a visionary. The bait fridge is always stocked and the burgers are fire. 5 stars forever.

replies.name: NoBaitNoThanks
replies.text: Visionary? More like disgusting. I almost vomited when I saw someone buy worms while I was trying to eat my salad. Hygiene nightmare. Todd's needs to pick a lane — restaurant OR bait shop. Not both.

replies.name: WormWhispererMI
replies.text: Lane? This is KALAMAZOO. We don't do lanes here — we do life. Burger in one hand, worm in the other. Cry harder.

replies.name: Todd (Owner)
replies.text: WormWhispererMI, visionary? Nah, just a guy who likes burgers and bass fishing. Thanks for the kind words — next time you're in, the loaded fries are on me. Keep whispering to those worms, they're listening! 🐛🍟

parent.name: ConflictedFisherGal
parent.text: Okay... pros: amazing burgers, fresh bait, convenient. Cons: the cognitive dissonance of smelling grilled onions while staring at a bucket of minnows is real. Still came back for the steak. But I'm conflicted. 3.5 stars rounded down because my soul hurts.

replies.name: Todd (Owner)
replies.text: ConflictedFisherGal, sorry your soul's taking a hit from the onion-minnow combo — that's just the aroma of opportunity! Glad you came back for the steak anyway. Next time bring earplugs for your soul and I'll throw in extra dipping sauce. Still love ya! 😏
